name: Kanemitsu Corporation
summary: Kanemitsu Corporation designs, develops, manufactures, and sells sheet metal pulleys for vehicles, agricultural machinery, and general equipment in Japan and internationally. The company offers transmission parts, such as inner drums, pistons, and plate rears; and airbag components, sensor plates, electric power steering parts, stainless steel chambers, pulleys, sprockets, and rib formation on boss parts.The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Akashi, Japan.
